title: Rail Fence Cipher Part 1: Encoding
body: Practice encoding Rail Fence ciphers manually.
lesson: 2A Caesar Cipher Part 1: Pattern Recognition, 2B Caesar Cipher Part 2: Pattern Recognition, 3A Rail Fence Cipher Part 1: Encoding, 3BRail Fence Cipher Part 2: Decoding, 6A Mixed Challenge 1B Part 1, 6B Mixed Challenge 1B Part 2
